nasb.text: The angel of the Lord went further, and stood in a narrow place where there was no way to turn to the right hand or the left.

esv.text: Then the angel of the Lord went ahead and stood in a narrow place, where there was no way to turn either to the right or to the left.

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者又往前行，站在狹窄之處，左右都沒有轉身的地方。

ccb.text: 耶和华的天使又走到前面，站在狭窄之处，两边都无侧身通过的余地。
